author: nateaune
text: Claude Code and OpenAI Codex are two of the most popular coding agents right now. They both run on the terminal and can edit files, run tests, and keep working on a problem for a long time. But they feel very different to use. Claude Code is more collaborative. Codex is more autonomous. Here's what stood out after using both for real work.
